title: ActiveCampaign vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and AWeber. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your business best.
intro: ActiveCampaign and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels for companies requiring advanced automation and CRM integration, while AWeber prioritizes simplicity for solopreneurs and small bloggers. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns with your marketing goals and budget.

comparison_table.tool_b: Freemium, free tier for up to 500 subscribers

comparison_table.tool_a: Advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring
comparison_table.tool_b: Ease of use, autoresponders, and RSS-to-email

comparison_table.tool_a: CRM, dynamic content, SMS, site tracking, lead scoring
comparison_table.tool_b: Landing pages, AMP emails, tagging, templates, autoresponders

choose_a_if: You need powerful automation workflows and CRM capabilities integrated into one platform
Your business requires lead scoring, SMS marketing, and advanced segmentation
You're willing to pay for premium features and don't need a free tier to start
choose_b_if: You're a solopreneur or small blogger looking for a simple, easy-to-use email tool
You want to start with a free plan and scale up gradually without upfront costs
You need RSS-to-email functionality and beautiful email templates without complexity

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring capabilities. AWeber is better for beginners and solopreneurs who prioritize simplicity and affordability. Both have strong ratings, but they serve different market segments.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is cheaper to start with—it offers a free tier for up to 500 subscribers. Both platforms begin paid plans at $15/month, but AWeber's free option makes it the more affordable choice for budget-conscious small businesses. ActiveCampaign has no free tier but offers more advanced features at its entry price.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and imports, making migration relatively straightforward. However, you may lose some AWeber-specific features (like RSS-to-email) if switching to ActiveCampaign, and vice versa. Plan ahead to ensure your workflows are compatible with your new platform.
